heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 117–58, div. F, title VI, § 60602(b)135 Stat. 1249Nov. 15, 2021
label: 344 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 117–58, div. F, title VI, § 60602(b)135 Stat. 1249Nov. 15, 2021
notes: Section, , as added and amended , , , established a telecommunications interagency working group to develop recommendations to address the workforce needs of the telecommunications industry and required a report containing its recommendations to be submitted to Congress no later than 1 year after the date on which the working group was established.act June 19, 1934, ch. 652, title III, § 344Pub. L. 117–58, div. F, title VI, § 60602135 Stat. 1246Nov. 15, 2021

Effective Date of Repeal, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–58, div. F, title VI, § 60602(b)135 Stat. 1249Nov. 15, 2021“Section 344 of the Communications Act of 1934 [], as added by subsection (a), shall be repealed on the day after the date on which the interagency working group established under subsection (b)(1) of that section [working group established ] submits the report to Congress under subsection (g) of that section [report submitted ].”47 U.S.C. 344Jan. 14, 2022Jan. 13, 2023
amendments: Section, , as added and amended , , , established a telecommunications interagency working group to develop recommendations to address the workforce needs of the telecommunications industry and required a report containing its recommendations to be submitted to Congress no later than 1 year after the date on which the working group was established.act June 19, 1934, ch. 652, title III, § 344Pub.
